Information We CollectTo make sure that we can offer you more of the music you want to hear, we collect a limited amount of information as you use Playo.	We collect information about the tracks you listen to and the playlists you build.We receive and maintain information about your device such as its hardware model and operating system, as well as its location and unique identifier.
And when you create an account using your Facebook or Google profile, we also receive and store information such as your name, email address and the usernames associated 		with those platforms.

How We Use Your InformationWe never rent or sell any personal information that we receive as our users enjoy our services. We do supply anonymized data to third parties that better enable them to 		make offers and place advertisements. We also review the data that we receive to improve our services.
